title: AutoGG-Fabric
description: Automatic "GG" messages after rounds — Fabric mod for Minecraft
body:
# AutoGG (Fabric)

**AutoGG** is a lightweight and highly configurable Fabric mod for Minecraft that automatically sends a **“GG”** or a **customizable message** in chat after a game round ends or when specific conditions are met.

Designed especially for multiplayer servers and mini-game environments, AutoGG helps you maintain good sportsmanship without requiring manual input after every match.

---

## ✨ Features

- **Automatic GG Messages**  
  Sends “GG” or a custom message automatically when a round ends.

- **Configurable Delay**  
  Set a delay before the message is sent to make it feel natural and human-like.

- **Fully Customizable Messages**  
  Use your own text instead of a simple “GG” to match your playstyle or server rules.

- **Fabric Mod Loader Support**  
  Built for modern Minecraft versions using the Fabric ecosystem.

- **Lightweight & Client-Side**  
  Minimal performance impact and easy to install.

---

## 🛠️ Use Cases

- Mini-game servers (BedWars, SkyWars, PvP arenas)
- Competitive multiplayer sessions
- Players who want to show sportsmanship automatically
- Streamers who want consistent end-of-round behavior

---

## ⚙️ Configuration

AutoGG uses an in-game configuration menu that allows you to:
- Enable or disable
- Adjust message delays
- Customize the sent message

The configuration menu is accessible via **Mod Menu**.

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Install **Fabric Loader** for your Minecraft version.
2. Install the required dependencies:
   - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
   - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
3. Download the **AutoGG (Fabric)** mod.
4. Place all `.jar` files into your `mods` folder.
5. Launch Minecraft and configure AutoGG via Mod Menu.

> ⚠️ **Note:**  
> Cloth Config API and Mod Menu are **required** for AutoGG to work correctly.

---

## 🔗 Source Code

GitHub Repository:  
https://github.com/EinsLucaaa/AutoGG-Fabric

---

## 🧩 Compatibility

- Minecraft (Fabric)
- Client-side mod
- Works on most multiplayer servers (no server-side installation required)

---

AutoGG is perfect for players who want to keep chat friendly and respectful — automatically.
